notes: Harmonic seed for q=0.99, canonical piecewise Chua, branch 0 (lowest gain).
gain:  k = -1 / Re(W_q(i*omega)), the describing-function gain.
amplitude: A satisfying N(A) = k (piecewise saturation DF).
seed: A * Re(v * exp(i*0)) where v is the dominant eigenvector
of (P + k*b*c^T), normalised so that c^T v = 1.
matched_eigenvalue: eigenvalue of the linearised matrix closest to (i*omega)^q.
Two candidates exist at q=0.99; branch 0 has the lower gain (more physical).
